//ConnectionStrings: Production overrides set the full connection string via env. Postgres must require TLS (Ssl Mode=Require;Trust Server Certificate=false). Elasticsearch URI must be https://. RabbitMQ host must be amqps://. See docs/secrets.md §TLS.

S3.//Endpoint: Production points at the KMS-encrypted bucket; SSE-KMS is the bucket default. SSE-S3 is the floor.
